race.description: Access Insulation Bruce Mclachlan Classic Qtis Hcp
race.comment: AREPRICE (2) has bumped into some smart juveniles in two runs this prep and been competitive. Worked home well to finish a length behind Cool Gent in the Listed Oxlade over 1200m at Eagle Farm three weeks ago. Back in trip but has the talent to stretch this field. TENGUN TOMMY (4) was rock solid in betting first-up over 1110m at Doomben and got the job done after stalking the pace throughout. Takes on a deeper field today but he has plenty of scope for improvement. ITCHINTOGO (1) appreciated the drop in grade over this course and distance last time out, improving sharply to finish third. Will roll forward and should run another cheeky race. SLING (5) caught the eye here at this trip last time. Must come into calculations with a cosy run assured out of gate one.
